taskDescription: Complete the crossword on gametogenesis and fertilisation

words.clue: Female gamete cell arrested at metaphase II until fertilisation
Structure formed from ruptured follicle that secretes progesterone
Hormone surge that triggers ovulation on day fourteen
Region of the fallopian tube where fertilisation normally occurs
Sperm cap enzyme reaction that enables zona pellucida penetration
Block to polyspermy involving release of granules from oocyte cortex
Phase of menstrual cycle dominated by progesterone from corpus luteum
Process of sperm acquiring ability to fertilise in the female tract
Glycoprotein layer surrounding the oocyte that sperm must penetrate
